front.label: Today's front page
front.caption: Illustration commissioned for this story. Photographs are credited where they appear.

latest.title: Latest
latest.empty: Nothing has been published yet. Write a story in the admin and it leads the front page.

mostRead.title: Most read
mostRead.note: Our reporting is funded by readers, not by advertisers. Nothing on this page was placed here by anyone who paid for it.

newsletter.title: The day's reporting, in your inbox before eight.
newsletter.copy: One email each weekday: what happened, what it means, and what we are still working on. No advertising, and no tracking pixels.
newsletter.label: Email address
newsletter.note: We send one email a day and you can leave with one click.

archive.empty: Nothing has been published in this section yet.

notFound.title: This page is not in print
notFound.description: The link may be out of date, or the story may have been moved or withdrawn.

error.title: The presses have stopped
error.description: This page could not be rendered. The problem has been logged and we are looking into it.
